rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND PARKER-GAYLORD VS. DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2014 line 3. DEFENDANTS DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE, OCWEN LOAN SERVICES, LLC, WESTERN PROGRESSIVE, LLC DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to January 16, 2015. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copy of reply. Reply does not appear to have been filed with the Court. Defendant shall address this issue and submit a declaration with explanation no later than January 1, 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ENGELBERG VS. ELLEN TSANG, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ARZA TRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2014 line 4. DEFENDANT ELLEN TSANG, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ARZA TRUST's AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: innocence. Christensen v. Tucker (1952) 114 Cal.App.2d 554. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)
